creator: mandrews@bit0.com
text:
Somewhat related: the mysql55-server port for 5.5.8 no longer includes 
support for the ARCHIVE engine.  This was a bit of a surprise as I could 
no longer start the server after upgrading; I had to downgrade to 5.5.7 
and convert all my ARCHIVE tables to MyISAM or InnoDB first.
